description_long: This is a medium-sized orange pumpkin with a rough, matte surface and a prominent, slightly weathered stem at the top. The front of the pumpkin features a traditional carved face, including two round eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, rectangular mouth with a few teeth, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The carving is somewhat irregular, with the mouth and eyes showing uneven edges and some discoloration around the nose area. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is uncarved, displaying natural grooves and subtle blemishes typical of a real pumpkin. The stem is dark brown and gray, appearing dry and fibrous. There are no visible decorative accessories or additional embellishments attached to the pumpkin.
description: A medium-sized orange pumpkin with a carved jack-o'-lantern face and a dry, fibrous stem. The surface is rough and matte, with natural grooves and some blemishes.
description_view_0: The front view shows the carved face with round eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, toothy mouth, along with the prominent stem.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the uncarved, smooth pumpkin surface and the stem, with only a hint of the facial carving visible.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the uncarved back of the pumpkin, showing natural grooves and blemishes, with the stem centered at the top.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the uncarved surface and the stem, with a partial glimpse of the facial carving on the left edge.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two round eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, rectangular mouth with uneven teeth. The carving is simple and slightly irregular, with no additional motifs or surface etchings.
